summary.en: Senior Software Engineer, Tech Lead, and Founding Engineer with extensive experience as a Full-Stack / Backend Engineer. Specialized in architecting scalable web applications, designing robust APIs, and leading collaborative engineering teams to deliver high-impact products.
summary.es: Desarrollador de software senior, Tech Lead y Founding Engineer con amplia experiencia como Full-Stack / Backend Engineer. Especializado en diseñar la arquitectura de aplicaciones web escalables, APIs robustas y liderar equipos de desarrollo para entregar productos de alto impacto.
